creator: josh@tcbug.org
text:
On Monday 05 March 2007 08:10, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of irc/epic5,
>
> Please note that PR ports/109922 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the
> patch and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/109922

Sure, I approve this patch. ;)

-- 
Thanks,

Josh Paetzel
